title: HollowLogs
description: A lightweight standalone port of the Hollow Logs from Quark, allowing players to crawl through craftable, transparent log variants for all vanilla wood types.
body:
# 🪵 Hollow Logs - Quark

This is a standalone port of the popular Hollow Logs feature from the Quark mod! I built this to easily bring hollow logs into your world without needing the entire Quark mod. They look great, have perfect transparent rendering, and you can even crawl right through them!

---

### 💖 Support

*   **Donations / Spenden:** [soon...](https://paypal.me/your-link-here)
*   **Modrinth Profile:** [nicomods on Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/user/nicomods)
*   **CurseForge Profile:** [nicomods on CurseForge](https://curseforge.com/members/nicomods)

---

## ✨ Features

- 🚶 **Crawlable Mechanics** — You can crawl directly through the center of every hollow log, perfect for secret bases and hidden tunnels!
- 🎨 **All Wood Types Supported** — Fully supports every vanilla wood type including Oak, Spruce, Birch, Jungle, Acacia, Dark Oak, Mangrove, Cherry, Crimson, Warped, and Bamboo.
- 🛠️ **Fully Craftable** — Simply place 8 logs or stems of the same type in a ring shape (with the middle slot empty) inside a crafting table to get 8 Hollow Logs.
- ⚡ **Lightweight & Lag-Free** — Contains exactly what it says on the tin without any unnecessary bloat.

---

## 🛠️ Crafting Recipe

![Crafting Recipe](https://i.imgur.com/95dPLaH.png)

---

## ⚙️ Requirements

| Requirement | Version |
| :--- | :--- |
| Minecraft Server / Client | **26.1.2** |
| Fabric API | *Required for Fabric version* |
| Neoforge loader | *Required for Neoforge version* |

---
